_comment: AHP conformance mutation config (build-phase B6). DEV-ONLY — Stryker lives in conformance/mutation/ and is NOT a dependency of the shipped @microsoft/agent-host-protocol client. INVOKE FROM THE REPO ROOT so Stryker's sandbox includes both the mutated reducer source (clients/typescript/src/**) AND the scenario corpus + replay harness the kill-signal needs:  cd <repo-root> && conformance/mutation/node_modules/.bin/stryker run conformance/mutation/stryker.conf.json
_ignore_comment: ignorePatterns governs BOTH mutation scope AND which files Stryker copies into its sandbox. The language build-artifact dirs (.build is a Swift SwiftPM dir that contains a unix SOCKET at .build/debug → copying it throws ENOTSUP) MUST be excluded or the sandbox copy crashes. Keep this list ahead of any cross-language build output.
_thresholds_comment: break=87 is the ratchet FLOOR (just under today's measured 87.70% — fails CI only on a regression below the current bar). Ratchet UP toward 90/92/95 as bucket-1 edge scenarios close. See DECISION.md. NOTE: channels-resource-watch/reducer.ts and common/reducer-helpers.ts hold EQUIVALENT/out-of-scope mutants (deliberate no-op state + warning-log-only); B7 should exclude them from the break calculation so the floor tracks real reducer behavior, not unkillable noise.
